select_inverter.title: Select Host Inverter
select_inverter.description: Found {count} inverters on your account. Select the Host inverter — it controls the Grid Feed-in and cycle strategy settings.

reconfigure_select.title: Change Host Inverter
reconfigure_select.description: Found {count} inverters on your account. Pick the Host inverter to use for Grid Feed-in and cycle strategy settings.

reauth_confirm.title: Reconnect Byte-Watt
reauth_confirm.description: Authentication for {username} failed. Enter the updated Byte-Watt password to reconnect without removing the integration.

error.auth: Invalid credentials. Please check your username and password.

abort.already_configured: This Byte-Watt account is already configured.
abort.auth: Authentication failed. Update credentials and try again.
abort.no_inverters: No inverters were found on this account.

host_inverter_required.title: Host inverter not configured
host_inverter_required.description: This Byte-Watt account has more than one inverter and no Host inverter has been selected. Grid Feed-in controls will not work until a Host is picked. Open Settings → Devices & Services, find the Byte-Watt entry, click the three-dot menu and choose Reconfigure.
